nodes.label: AI as structural solution provider for readability
nodes.label_negative: AI as inadequate for nuanced editorial judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I asked the AI how I make this more readable without removing any of the numbers

nodes.label: AI as quality control tool for stealth typos and regional spelling
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable due to nonsensical suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: It has saved me some embarrassment a couple times, catching typos for me

nodes.label: Privacy concern with AI use
nodes.label_negative: Openness to sharing proprietary data with AI
nodes.grounding_span: Privacy is a concern. Sometimes the things I edit has proprietary trade names and data

nodes.label: AI as limited to specific stages of work
nodes.label_negative: AI as integrated throughout the creative process
nodes.grounding_span: Usually my first run at a piece of work is just me and myself working at it. Then the second run is when I get more technical, using reference books and AI

nodes.label: AI as consultant for discrete problems
nodes.grounding_span: I give it a problem, it suggests a potential solution; I think about the solution, and accept or reject it

nodes.label: Readability and precision in technical writing
nodes.grounding_span: striking a balance between being casually readable and more technical

nodes.label: Professional accuracy and error reduction
nodes.grounding_span: It has saved me some embarrassment a couple times, catching typos for me

nodes.label: Client confidentiality and data security
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to put that 'out there'

nodes.label: Human editorial judgment and autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I can't dispense with my own judgment

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for structural suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: I went with the bullet points, as that was easily readable while still containing all the information needed

nodes.label: Appreciation for AI catching stealth typos
nodes.grounding_span: It has saved me some embarrassment a couple times, catching typos for me

nodes.label: Concern about privacy with AI
nodes.grounding_span: Privacy is a concern. Sometimes the things I edit has proprietary trade names and data

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI's nonsensical suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes the AI makes suggestions that don't make a lot of sense

nodes.label: Optimism about AI improving but not replacing human editors
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully not good enough to obviate my job, but I suspect that may be unlikely

nodes.label: Selective and stage-specific tool use
nodes.grounding_span: Usually my first run at a piece of work is just me and myself working at it. Then the second run is when I get more technical, using reference books and AI

nodes.label: One-shot problem solving with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I give it a problem, it suggests a potential solution; I think about the solution, and accept or reject it. Usually I don't iterate on the problem
